title: Checker Maturity Gate

notes: Owner Activation Gate. Policy activation requires named Owner + explicit signoff. Owner's no is absolute (Rust RFC pattern).

Reference-only; no compliance, certification, endorsement, partnership, public-standard, production-readiness, or authorization claim.

title: Ordivon Enhancement Proposal Process (EGB-2)
notes: OEP process for high-consequence and cross-boundary Ordivon changes. Evidence for review only; not approval, release permission, merge permission, deployment permission, policy activation, or external action authorization.

notes: Record-only freeze protocol for stage templates: open_scope, enhancement_freeze, verification_freeze, closure_freeze, closed. Stage control evidence only; not release or action authorization.

notes: Diagnostic trust-budget model for missing evidence, degraded/blocked counts, stale sources, registry drift, open debt, and checker shadow state. Evidence only; not action authorization.

notes: Read-only agent evidence import boundary for traces, checkpoints, skills, MCP manifests, hooks, tool calls, and memory records. Does not add adapter, SDK, MCP server, agent runner, token refresh, external tool invocation, or action authorization.
